pinyin: nín hǎo, qǐng wèn jǐ wèi?
liǎng wèi, yǒu kào chuāng de wèi zhi ma?
translation: Two. Do you have a table by the window?

pinyin: xiè xiè. qǐng gěi wǒ men cài dān.
translation: Thank you. Please give us the menu.

text: 好的，这是菜单，今天有特价鱼。
pinyin: hǎo de, zhè shì cài dān, jīn tiān yǒu tè jià yú.
translation: OK, here is the menu. Today we have a special on fish.

text: 太好了，我想尝尝你们的水煮鱼。
pinyin: tài hǎo le, wǒ xiǎng cháng chang nǐ men de shuǐ zhǔ yú.
translation: Great. I would like to try your boiled fish.

pinyin: hǎo de, yào wēi là hái shì zhōng là?
wēi là ba, wǒ bú tài néng chī là.
translation: Mild, please. I can't eat very spicy food.

text: 再来一个宫保鸡丁和一盘青菜。
pinyin: zài lái yí gè gōng bǎo jī dīng hé yì pán qīng cài.
translation: Also a Kung Pao chicken and a plate of greens.

pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng wèn hē shén me?
translation: OK. What would you like to drink?

text: 我要一杯冰红茶，他要一瓶啤酒。
pinyin: wǒ yào yì bēi bīng hóng chá, tā yào yì píng pí jiǔ.
translation: I'll have an iced black tea, and he'll have a beer.

pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng shāo děng, cài mǎ shàng lái.
translation: OK. Please wait a moment. The food will be ready soon.

text: 这道菜真好吃，味道很正宗。
pinyin: zhè dào cài zhēn hǎo chī, wèi dào hěn zhèng zōng.
translation: This dish is delicious. The taste is very authentic.

pinyin: shì a, wǒ yě jué de bú cuò.
yí gòng yì bǎi liù shí bā kuài.
gěi nǐ liǎng bǎi, bú yòng zhǎo le.
xiè xiè, huān yíng xià cì guāng lín!
translation: Thank you. Welcome back next time!
